mapper.select: SELECT token_id AS tokenId , user_id AS userId , email_token AS emailToken , token_type AS tokenType , fail_count AS failCount , created_at AS createdAt , expires_at AS expiresAt FROM email_verification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND token_type = #{tokenType} AND expires_at > SYSDATE
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM email_verification WHERE expires_at <= SYSDATE
